recent_commits.message: docs: add AGPL-3.0 license for open source with SaaS protection
docs: add pipeline progress reporting guidelines to CLAUDE.md
fix: change allowed_origins from list[str] to str for pydantic-settings
fix: handle comma-separated ALLOWED_ORIGINS in env and add defaults
refactor: replace Anthropic Claude API with Google Gemini API
fix: prevent crash when Supabase env vars contain placeholder values
fix: handle missing Supabase env vars gracefully in middleware
feat: initialize Sprint 1 foundation for Fanen project

changed_files.impact_description: Configuration module with critical CORS, Supabase, and Gemini API settings. Changed 3 times in last 5 commits (hotspot). Any changes to environment variable parsing affect app initialization and authentication.
Main FastAPI application entry point. Imports config and sets up CORS middleware. Router registration point for new endpoints. Recent fix to CORS handling requires verification.
Python dependencies file. Updated once in last 5 commits (Gemini API migration). Dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn, google-generativeai, supabase, upstash-redis.
JWT authentication middleware using Supabase JWT secret. Depends on settings from config.py. Will be used in all protected routes in Sprint 2.
Health check endpoint. Currently registered. Minimal changes expected.
Supabase environment variable validation middleware. Handles graceful failures. Modified 3 times in recent commits to handle missing env vars.

hotspot_files.note: Critical configuration file changed in last 3 commits (CORS handling fixes + Gemini API migration)
Middleware validation logic for Supabase env vars, changed in last 3 commits

risk_summary.main_concern: railway-api/app/core/config.py and main.py are hotspots with recent CORS and environment variable handling changes. No test coverage exists. Sprint 2 will require new route handlers that depend on these modules.

past_failures.pattern: CORS misconfiguration causing frontend requests to fail
past_failures.avoidance: Recent commits fixed CORS string handling. When adding new routes, verify CORSMiddleware settings are preserved and test with actual frontend.

past_failures.pattern: Missing or placeholder environment variables causing app crashes
past_failures.avoidance: Latest changes add graceful handling. For Sprint 2, ensure all new Supabase/Gemini API calls have default fallbacks.

recommendations_for_planner: HIGH PRIORITY: Add unit tests for railway-api/app/core/config.py to prevent future CORS/environment variable regressions. Current test coverage is 0%.
When implementing Sprint 2 routes (portfolio, analysis endpoints), test CORS headers explicitly with curl/Postman from frontend domain.
Review recent CORS string parsing fix (commit 29812d4) to understand comma-separated origins handling before adding new origins.
railway-api/requirements.txt includes google-generativeai (version 0.8.3). Verify Gemini API integration during Sprint 2 implementation.
Note: No test files exist in railway-api/. Consider creating tests/ directory structure and conftest.py for FastAPI testing.
Frontend middleware (src/middleware.ts) now has graceful Supabase var handling. Verify matching error handling in FastAPI routes.
All protected routes in Sprint 2 should use Depends(get_current_user) from auth.py middleware. Document this requirement in route implementation guidelines.

test_gaps.suggestion: Add pytest tests for: CORS origins parsing (single, multiple, edge cases), all environment variable loading paths, default values
Add integration tests for: app startup/shutdown, CORS headers in responses, router inclusion
Add JWT verification tests with: valid tokens, expired tokens, malformed headers, missing Authorization header
